text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Rice Shower and I wrap up
training...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm just happy that you're all healed up... And that
we can run together again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My complete recovery is no doubt thanks to my
research. I tested multiple forms of treatment,
including those involving geothermal springs.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Flustered and with tears in her eyes, Rice Shower
hurriedly checks the expiration date on the hot
spring coupon. Relieved, we take a trip to the inn
to use it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... the water felt so nice! And my skin feels so
soft now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Look, look! My legs are all warmed up and feel
much more limber than usual!
choice_data_list: That's the hot spring doing its work.
That's the hot spring doing its work.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I don't think there's a stretch I couldn't do right
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She stares at her legs gleefully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's won quite a few races now with them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope this hot spring trip has helped her feel a
bit refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: I hope you're always healthy and happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: I hope you're always healthy and happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry about me. These legs can take me
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I mean, they've carried me this far. Thanks to them, I've gotten through the spring Tenno Sho and the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: With you by my side the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: With you by my side the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. So what should our next race be?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. So what should our next race be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We talk about our future plans for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Rice Shower and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
